Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants to analyze an event log and rename recurring activities based on their context within each case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Recurring activities in the log Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003 Call Customer appears twice in C002 and once in C001 and C003

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C001 first Verify Agent checks identity documents C001 second Verify Agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided C003 first Verify Physical verification of ID C003 second Verify Re verify docs after account adjustment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C001 Call Verification incomplete agent calls to request missing docs C002 first Call Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy C002 second Call Follow up call to confirm adjustments made C003 Call Customer stepped out Officer calls to have them return

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Activities Verify Documents First instance initial check Initial Document Verification Second instance re check Re verify Documents or Document Re verification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Call Customer C001 Call for Missing Documents or Request Missing Documents C002 first Call to Clarify Discrepancy C002 second Call to Confirm Adjustments C003 Call Customer Back to Branch or Recall Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait the prompt says Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case So Verify Documents and Call Customer both appear multiple times in C001 C002 C003

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets rename them consistently based on context

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: C001 Verify Documents first Initial Document Verification Call Customer Call to Request Missing Docs Submit Additional Submit Additional Docs Verify Documents second Re verify Documents Approve Request Final Approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: C002 Verify Documents Initial Document Verification Call Customer first Call to Clarify Discrepancy Adjust Account Adjust Account Call Customer second Follow up Call to Confirm Approve Request Final Approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: C003 Verify Documents first Initial Document Verification Call Customer Call Customer Back Adjust Account Adjust Account Verify Documents second Re verify Documents Approve Request Final Approval

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait does Approve Request recur No it only appears once per case Does Initiate Request recur No Does Adjust Account recur No

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Specifically Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and interpret how their meaning changes depending on their position in the process or the associated context So I only need to rename the ones that appear multiple times or rename all instances of the recurring ones

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents 1st time Initial Document Verification 2nd time Document Re verification For Call Customer C001 Call for Missing Documents C002 1st Call for Discrepancy Clarification C002 2nd Call for Adjustment Confirmation C003 Call to Recall Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Justification Verify Documents In C001 and C003 it occurs twice The first time is an initial check of documents Initial Document Verification The second time occurs after the customer has provided missing info or after an account adjustment so it is a re check Document Re verification

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Call Customer Appears twice in C002 and once in C001 and C003 but in entirely different contexts that could be confused if the process is generalized In C001 the call is specifically to request missing documents Call for Missing Documents In C002 the first call is to clarify an account discrepancy Call for Discrepancy Clarification and the second is to confirm that adjustments were successfully made Call for Adjustment Confirmation In C003 the call is made because the customer stepped out of the branch so its a call to get them back Call to Recall Customer
